title: New ClawHub skill: arxiv-search - Search academic papers on arXiv by keyword, author, category
content:
Search academic papers on arXiv by keyword, author, category, or ID. Fetch abstracts, download PDFs, and export citations.

Free + MIT. Live on ClawHub: clawhub.ai/skills/skills/arxiv-search

Part of the Hermes autonomous product stack (31 agent-native tools, all CI-tested).
Sponsor if useful: GitHub Sponsors / Buy Me a Coffee.
